original_image_tags: scan of a typed document page with two hole-punch marks at the top. The text is a brief incident report. The bottom two-thirds of the page is blank.

elements.description: Page containing only typed text, including the header 'Incident: 201 B' and two paragraphs describing a UFO sighting. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is a typed document with no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts, though they disagree on some structural details (e.g., blank space vs. two paragraphs).
